data.title: Add integration tests: sync orchestration, file locking, and tag preconditions; record RED confirmation
data.description:
## What
Extend tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh with failing tests for sync orchestration, file locking, and tag precondition checks. Then run the complete test suite, confirm all tests fail (RED), and record the result as a ticket comment on story b4c1-06cf.

## testing_mode: RED (test additions) + GREEN (confirmation recording)

## Test Scenarios (Given/When/Then)

### Sync Orchestration (FP-SYNC-1 through FP-SYNC-5)
- FP-SYNC-1: Given a valid Figma URL and configured PAT, when figma-pull-sync.sh runs, then a lockfile is created at the expected path before the sync proceeds
- FP-SYNC-2: Given a stale lockfile (mtime > TTL), when figma-pull-sync.sh runs, then the stale lock is cleaned and sync proceeds (does not exit with lock-conflict error)
- FP-SYNC-3: Given a valid URL and PAT, when figma-pull-sync.sh runs interactively and the user inputs 'n' at the confirmation prompt, then sync is aborted and exits non-zero without writing any manifest changes
- FP-SYNC-4: Given a valid URL and PAT, when figma-pull-sync.sh runs with --non-interactive, then sync proceeds without a confirmation prompt and exits 0
- FP-SYNC-5: Given a successful sync, when figma-pull-sync.sh completes, then a ticket comment is written containing: Figma file key, timestamp, components added/modified/removed counts, behavioral specs preserved count

### Tag Preconditions (FP-PRECOND-1)
- FP-PRECOND-1: Given a story ticket without the design:awaiting_review tag, when figma-pull-sync.sh runs on that story, then exits 1 with a message explaining the required tag

## RED Confirmation Step
After adding all tests, run the suite and confirm RED:
```bash
bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh 2>&1 | tail -20
```
Then record the output summary as a ticket comment:
```bash
.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment b4c1-06cf "RED confirmed: <paste FAILED line count and summary from test output>"
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] File contains FP-SYNC-1 through FP-SYNC-5 and FP-PRECOND-1
  Verify: for label in FP-SYNC-1 FP-SYNC-2 FP-SYNC-3 FP-SYNC-4 FP-SYNC-5 FP-PRECOND-1; do grep -q "$label" tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh || exit 1; done; echo OK
- [ ] Running test suite exits non-zero (RED confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] RED confirmation comment recorded on story b4c1-06cf
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show b4c1-06cf | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); comments=d.get('comments',[]); assert any('RED confirmed' in c.get('body','') for c in comments), 'RED comment missing'"
